info.title: Workloads Client
info.description: Epic client provides access to various epic operations.

get.description: Gets all Virtual Instances for Epic solutions resources in a Subscription.
Gets all Virtual Instances for Epic solution resources in a Resource Group.
Gets a Virtual Instance for Epic solutions resource

parameters.name: epicVirtualInstanceName
parameters.description: The name of the Virtual Instances for Epic solutions resource

delete.description: Deletes a Virtual Instance for Epic solutions resource and its child resources, that is the associated Wss Services Instance, HyperspaceWeb Server Instances and Database Instance.

delete.description: Deletes the Epic Presentation Services Instance resource. <br><br>This will be used by service only. Delete operation on this resource by end user will return a Bad Request error. You can delete the parent resource, which is the Virtual Instance for Epic solutions resource, using the delete operation on it.

DatabaseServerDetails.description: Describes the registration details of a Database Server VM, including its identifier and role.

id.description: The unique identifier of the virtual machine, essential for identification and configuration in the registration process.

role.description: The role of the VM within the database server's registration framework, indicating its specific function.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

DatabaseServerInstanceListResult.description: The response of a DatabaseServerInstance list operation.

value.description: The DatabaseServerInstance items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

DatabaseServerInstanceTagsUpdate.description: The type used for updating tags in DatabaseServerInstance resources.

vmDetails.description: The list of virtual machines corresponding to the Database resource.

health.description: Defines the health of Epic Instances.

errors.description: Defines the errors related to Database resource.

virtualMachineId.description: The unique identifier of the virtual machine.

role.description: The role of the database VM.

DatabaseVmRole.description: The role of the database VM.

EpicEnvironmentType.description: Defines the environment type - Production/Non Production.

values.name: NonProduction
values.description: Environment is designated for non-production use.

values.name: Production
values.description: Environment is designated for production use.

EpicHealthState.description: Defines the health of Epic Instances.

environment.description: Defines the environment type - Production/Non Production.

configuration.description: Defines if the Epic system is being created using Azure Center for Epic solutions (ACSS) or if an existing Epic system is being registered with ACSS

state.description: Defines the Virtual Instance for Epic state.

errors.description: Indicates any errors on the Virtual Instance for Epic solutions resource.

values.name: RegistrationInProgress

values.name: RegistrationComplete
values.description: Registration of the instance is complete.

code.description: Service specific error code which serves as the substatus for the HTTP error code.
